title: Campaign Monitor vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Campaign Monitor vs Omnisend. Discover pricing, features, and which email marketing tool suits your business best.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Omnisend: Detailed Comparison
intro: Campaign Monitor and Omnisend are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Campaign Monitor excels for agencies managing multiple brands, while Omnisend is purpose-built for e-commerce businesses seeking integrated email and SMS capabilities. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns with your specific business needs.
choose_a_if: You manage multiple brands or client accounts requiring separate campaign management
You need robust template building and design-focused features for professional agencies
You primarily require email marketing without SMS or push notification channels
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce business and want email and SMS marketing in one platform
You're starting out and want to test a platform with a free tier before paying
You need pre-built workflows and omnichannel automation to maximize customer engagement

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Omnisend?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor is superior for agencies managing multiple brands, while Omnisend is better for e-commerce businesses needing integrated SMS and email. Omnisend rates higher on review platforms (4.5 on G2 vs 4.1) and offers better overall versatility with omnichannel features.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Omnisend?
faq.a: Omnisend is more affordable overall, offering a free tier for up to 250 subscribers with no credit card required. Campaign Monitor has no free tier and starts at $11/month, while Omnisend's paid plans begin at $16/month. For budget-conscious startups, Omnisend's free tier provides significant value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, most email marketing platforms support subscriber list exports. Both tools allow you to export your contacts in standard formats (CSV/Excel), making migration straightforward. However, you'll need to manually rebuild automation workflows and campaigns in Campaign Monitor, as platform-specific designs don't transfer automatically.
